name: Crabmeat Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a Dutch oven.
2. Add onions, celery, bell pepper, and pimiento to the melted butter; sauté until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in flour and blend well with the vegetables.
4. Gradually add hot half-and-half, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
5. Stir in white wine, salt, and cayenne pepper.
6. Place crabmeat (2 pounds of lump crab, picked over) in a buttered baking dish.
7. Spoon the sauce over the crabmeat and sprinkle with grated cheese.
8. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until bubbly.
